cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by a previous page. Pages are sorted by (correspondence_date desc, _id desc).

include_email_recipients.description: When true, the textual `search` is also matched against `to_emails.name` and `bcc_emails.name`. Off by default to keep the index light.

categories.description: Categories to include. Only DOCUMENT and EMAIL are allowed.

cursor.description: Cursor for pagination: _id of the last item from the previous page.

case_contact_id.description: ID of the contact (contact._id from case_contacts array)

client_contact_id.description: ID of the client contact (contact._id from matter.clients array)

selected_company_id.description: ID of the company to use for {contact.company.*} variables

selected_related_contact_id.description: ID of the related contact to use for {contact.related-contact.*} variables

lawyer.description: ID of the attorney to use for {lawyer.*} variables

time_entries_override_value.description: Override value for time entries total. If provided, time entry values will be distributed proportionally.
Override value for time entries total. If provided, time entry values will be distributed proportionally.

show_tasks_counter.description: Array of task priorities to show in the sidebar counter

purge_training_data.description: Whether to purge training data on activation

consolidated_into.description: TimeEntry this entry was consolidated into

snapshot.description: Snapshot of original values before consolidation

value.description: New total entry value after write-down

do_not_bill.description: Whether the time entry should not be billed

target_entry_id.description: Target time entry ID to consolidate into

restored.description: Number of source entries that were restored

parent_folder.description: Filter by parent folder ID. Use null/empty for root folders only, or omit to get all folders

files.description: Array of files to generate presigned URLs for (max: 1000)

ttl.description: TTL in seconds (default: 3600 = 1 hour, max: 604800 = 7 days)

key.description: S3 key where the file will be stored
S3 key of the file in the bucket

title.description: Title/name of the file or correspondence

document.description: For PDF, DOCX, TXT files, etc.

parent_folder.description: Parent folder ID where the correspondence will be created

key.description: S3 key from batch presigned upload

failed_count.description: Number of correspondences that failed to update

category.description: Category: FOLDER, DOCUMENT, EMAIL, CALL, NOTE, THIRD_PARTY

matter_ids.description: Filter by matter IDs (optional, processes all if omitted)

batch_size.description: Number of emails to process per batch (default: 100, max: 1000)

total_count.description: Total number of emails to be processed

matter_id.description: Matter ID to repair email metadata for

failed.description: Number of emails that failed to repair
